llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 11.1 (Resolution 9, COVID-19 vaccination discussion) pulled until October 20 board meeting due to Governor Newsom's announcement requiring COVID-19 vaccination. Items 11.2-11.6 and 11.8 moved to consent agenda. Item 9.1 kept on agenda despite pull request due to speaker card filed.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Roll call vote, please. Trusty Wells. Aye. Christy Lawson. Aye. Christy Marquez. Aye. Vice President Diaz locum. Aye. President McAvoy. Aye.
